activeDG.title: Provider intermittent-empty (deepseek returns 200 OK with content=null/empty) — root cause fix + retry pattern
activeDG.verified_root_cause: packages/agents/src/openai-compatible-client.ts:133-144 parseOpenAiCompatibleResponse throws cuando content es null/undefined/empty string. El SDK OpenAI reintenta 429/5xx pero NO reintenta 200 OK con content vacío — el error va directo al Triage caller y marca el finding como failed.
activeDG.empirical_evidence: 3 Baselines consecutivos con fails: Baseline-8 (Security check suppressed 1/1), Baseline-8c (Security check suppressed 1/1 + CORS success), Baseline-8d (Security check suppressed 2/2 persistente + CORS flipped success→fail). deepseek-v4-flash intermittent behavior.
